chunks.title: Call to Expand the Tent
chunks.reason: A direct command to the barren woman to enlarge her dwelling and spread abroad.

chunks.title: Promise of Restoration and Covenant
chunks.reason: A divine oracle reassuring the woman of her future glory and God's everlasting covenant.

chunks.title: Promise of Security and Victory
chunks.reason: A prophetic blessing describing the rebuilding of the city and the assurance of victory over enemies.
